summary: Prismatic Agora is a completed MuranoOS authority packet for a room-as-operating-system.
final_use_case: It matters because collaborative knowledge work needs more than files: it needs a governed place where roles, evidence, disagreement, memory, and decisions can meet.

instruments.input: source packet, code-ready room description, scope, and intended runtime
instruments.operation: Prismatic Agora is a completed MuranoOS authority packet for a room-as-operating-system.
instruments.output: bounded definition of what the handoff asks a builder to construct
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires source packet, code-ready room description, scope, and intended runtime
instruments.downstream_use: Feeds bounded definition of what the handoff asks a builder to construct; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.
instruments.proof: Expected proof artifact: bounded definition of what the handoff asks a builder to construct
instruments.gap: Verify one representative case: the step should accept source packet, code-ready room description, scope, and intended runtime and produce bounded definition of what the handoff asks a builder to construct.
instruments.verification_check: Open or inspect the local runtime path for Prismatic Agora Handoff Identity; confirm a room, action, or state record traces to the governing contract.

instruments.input: user roles, task sequence, room state, and domain objects
instruments.operation: It routes a room's purpose, roles, instruments, deliberation spaces, memory, governance rules, and export surfaces into one operating design so the room can host coordinated intellectual work.
instruments.output: room logic that turns the concept into a repeatable workflow
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires user roles, task sequence, room state, and domain objects

instruments.verification_check: Open or inspect the local runtime path for Prismatic Agora Room Task Model; confirm a room, action, or state record traces to the governing contract.

instruments.instrument_name: Prismatic Agora Data Schema And Persistence Plan
instruments.input: entities, records, IDs, tables, JSON structures, indexes, and state transitions
instruments.operation: Writing, rhetoric, narrative design, visual culture, and presentation. Use source library writing/visual/cinema sources to strengthen public exposition and Trilogy visual/storytelling logic. Vision: Make public pages read as curated intellectual exhibits rather than dashboards. Mechanism: Extract narrative sequencing, visual perception, close reading, rhetoric, style, cinema, and presentation mechanisms. Plan: Apply after domain-source routing so style clarifies evidence rather than masking weak evidence. Status.
instruments.output: data model that lets the room preserve work instead of acting like a static page
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires entities, records, IDs, tables, JSON structures, indexes, and state transitions
instruments.downstream_use: Feeds data model that lets the room preserve work instead of acting like a static page; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.
instruments.proof: Expected proof artifact: data model that lets the room preserve work instead of acting like a static page
instruments.gap: Verify one representative case: the step should accept entities, records, IDs, tables, JSON structures, indexes, and state transitions and produce data model that lets the room preserve work instead of acting like a.
instruments.verification_check: Open or inspect the local runtime path for Prismatic Agora Data Schema And Persistence Plan; confirm a room, action, or state record traces to the governing contract.

instruments.input: frontend, backend, storage, retrieval, auth, export, and portfolio linkage
instruments.operation: How this briefing says the vision should be accomplished, translated into a public project route. When to reach for this: when designing any civic / deliberation / participatory room; when you need a concrete object/event/permission model for a room that must stage recognition + surveillance + governance + feed simultaneously; when a developer needs a single adapter boundary that isolates runtime-specific work from conceptual room logic; when building a room that must hold contradictions rather than resolve them.
instruments.output: build sequence for turning the handoff into working software
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires frontend, backend, storage, retrieval, auth, export, and portfolio linkage
instruments.downstream_use: Feeds build sequence for turning the handoff into working software; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.

instruments.gap: Verify one representative case: the step should accept frontend, backend, storage, retrieval, auth, export, and portfolio linkage and produce build sequence for turning the handoff into working software.
instruments.verification_check: Open or inspect the local runtime path for Prismatic Agora Integration Path; confirm a room, action, or state record traces to the governing contract.
